title: Linking Polite Phrases
learningGoal: Master the linked pronunciation of common polite phrases (Could you, Would you, Can I) and contractions (I'd like, wanna).
instructions: Could you や Would you のようなフレーズは、単語がつながって発音されます（リンキング）。ネイティブのようにスムーズに言えるように練習しましょう。マイクに向かってリピートしてください。(Practice linking the words in polite phrases. Repeat into the microphone.)

targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: The 'd' in Could and the 'y' in you link together to make a 'j' sound. Cuh-joo.
Similar to Could you, the 'd' and 'y' blend to a 'j' sound. Wuh-joo.

targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'Kyan Ai' with a pause in the middle.

targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: 〜してもよろしいでしょうか
targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Link the 'y' sound smoothly into the 'I'. May-yai.

targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: 〜が欲しいです（I would like の短縮）

targetPhrasesOrWords.transliteration: アイ ウッド ライク
targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Try not to put an 'o' at the end of would. I wud like.

targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: 〜したい（want to のカジュアルな発音）
targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Wa-nuh. This is very casual, so use it with friends, not in polite situations!
Make sure the 's' at the end sounds like a 'z'. Plee-z.

expectedPronunciationText: Could you Would you Can I Can you May I I'd like I would like Would you like wanna please

feedbackRules.onPass: Excellent! Your linking sounds very natural, just like a native speaker.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Focus on blending the words together (like Cuh-joo). Don't pause between them.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Remember to make the 's' in 'please' sound like a 'z'.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: Could you Would you Can I Can you May I I'd like I would like Would you like wanna please
acceptedVariants: Could you Would you Can I Can you May I I would like I would like Would you like wanna please
could you would you can i can you may i i'd like i would like would you like want to please
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: Could you Would you Can I Can you May I I'd like I would like Would you like wanna please
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: cuhjoo wuhjoo caneye cannyoo mayeye idelike eyewudlike wuhjoolike wunuh pleez

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Could you, Would you, Can I, Can you, May I, I'd like, I would like, Would you like, wanna, please

hintText: Try to say 'Could you' as one word, not two separate words.
